headline.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
headline.summary: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.

creative.title: An AI model programmed nonstop for 19 days on a single MirrorCode task that cost $2,600 to run
creative.summary: Epoch AI's new MirrorCode benchmark tests whether AI models can recreate complete programs without access to the original code. Claude Opus 4.7 leads with a 56 percent solve rate, rebuilding a 16,000-line toolkit in just 14 hours. But every model tes
creative.content:
Epoch AI's new MirrorCode benchmark tests whether AI models can recreate complete programs without access to the original code. Claude Opus 4.7 leads with a 56 percent solve rate, rebuilding a 16,000-line toolkit in just 14 hours. But every model tested still fails on the most complex tasks.
The article An AI model programmed nonstop for 19 days on a single MirrorCode task that cost $2,600 to run appeared first on The Decoder.

culture.title: Australian rescue team uses AI-powered drone to find lost hikers – video
culture.summary: Two men in their 20s were found within five hours thanks to an artificial intelligence-powered drone, which used thermal imaging to locate them. Two hikers veered off a walking track in Kosciuszko national park, New South Wales, on Tuesday, and were
culture.content:
Two men in their 20s were found within five hours thanks to an artificial intelligence-powered drone, which used thermal imaging to locate them. Two hikers veered off a walking track in Kosciuszko national park, New South Wales, on Tuesday, and were found about half a kilometre off the track. It was the first time the FRNSW drone’s AI detection system had been used to rescue missing people

culture.content:

Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast

Two hikers who veered off a walking track in Kosciuszko national park have been found within five hours using a drone powered by artificial intelligence, a first-of-its-kind mission, Fire and Rescue NSW (FRNSW) has said.

culture.title: OpenAI staggers AI model release after Trump administration request
culture.summary:
Sam Altman announces limited preview of GPT 5.6 in move that echoes launch of Anthropic’s Mythos

Business live – latest updates

OpenAI is staggering the release of its latest AI model after a request from the US government, in a move echoing the la
culture.content:
Sam Altman announces limited preview of GPT 5.6 in move that echoes launch of Anthropic’s Mythos

Business live – latest updates

OpenAI is staggering the release of its latest AI model after a request from the US government, in a move echoing the launch of Anthropic’s Mythos product.
The company behind ChatGPT signalled its dissatisfaction with the move, saying that doing so keeps the best AI tools from “users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them”.
 Conti
